summary: Tested Image Search APIs and Language Support for Syrian E-commerce App. All 12 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend components verified: Image Search button and modal work correctly. Language Context is implemented but Language toggle UI is not yet added to Settings page.

issues: Language toggle UI is not visible in Settings page - LanguageContext is implemented (200+ translations) but no UI to change language exists

action_items: Add Language Toggle UI to Settings page to allow users to switch between Arabic (العربية) and English
critical_code_review_comments: Image Search API (POST /api/image-search/search) - Works correctly, validates image base64 format, size (min 100 bytes), and calls GPT-5.2 Vision
Image Upload API (POST /api/image-search/upload) - Works correctly, validates file type (JPEG, PNG, WEBP), max 10MB
ImageSearchModal.js - Well implemented with upload/camera buttons, AI badge, bilingual text support (AR/EN)
Header.js - Image search button (data-testid='image-search-btn') properly integrated with Camera icon
LanguageContext.js - Fully implemented with 200+ translations for both Arabic and English, includes toggleLanguage(), formatPrice(), formatDate(), isRTL
LanguageProvider is correctly wrapped in App.js
MISSING: Settings page needs Language toggle UI - useLanguage hook should be added to SettingsPage.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image Search APIs fully tested and working. Both /api/image-search/search (base64) and /api/image-search/upload (file) endpoints work. Frontend ImageSearchModal opens via camera button in Header (data-testid='image-search-btn'). LanguageContext.js has 200+ translations for AR/EN but Settings page doesn't have UI to toggle language - main agent needs to add language toggle UI.

image_search_api.details: Accepts base64 image, validates size (min 100 bytes), uses GPT-5.2 Vision for analysis, returns similar products

image_upload_api.details: Accepts file upload, validates type (JPEG/PNG/WEBP), max 10MB size

image_search_button.details: Camera icon button (data-testid='image-search-btn') in Header search bar, opens ImageSearchModal

image_search_modal.details: Modal opens correctly, has Upload/Camera buttons, drag-drop zone, AI badge, bilingual support

language_context.details: LanguageContext.js implemented with 200+ translations, toggleLanguage(), formatPrice(), formatDate(), isRTL

language_toggle_ui.details: Settings page does not have Language toggle UI - needs to be added by main agent
